overall.description: A first-person perspective clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player observing a bar interaction through a window, then walking through a rainy futuristic urban plaza with modern architecture and neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway overlooking futuristic bar interior

events.description: woman enters the bar and sits across from man at high table
camera turns away from bar window and begins moving toward the outdoor plaza

agents.ego_description: standing outside the glass bar facade watching the interaction between two patrons inside

notable_agents.action: man sitting at high table drinking and waiting
woman with blonde hair entering and sitting down to talk with the man

entered.detail: large glass window revealing illuminated bar interior with neon lighting
round metal table with tall stool near the window
illuminated bar counter with bottles visible in the background
dark wooden planks of the covered exterior walkway
blue and red neon lights visible through the glass inside the bar

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view through a large glass window into a futuristic bar. A man sits at a high table inside while a woman enters and joins him. The camera remains stationary observing this interaction from the wooden deck walkway outside, then begins to turn away toward the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy futuristic commercial plaza with modern glass architecture

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with heavy rain falling
camera continues walking past outdoor seating areas with white umbrellas
passing by outdoor bar area with patrons seated at counter

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy urban plaza observing the futuristic architecture and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing sitting at outdoor bar counter around 50 seconds

entered.detail: rain-soaked reflective pavement tiles with puddles forming
curved multi-story building with horizontal glass windows and balconies
black metal framework structure with curved roof in plaza center
large white umbrellas over outdoor seating areas
building entrance with glowing red signage above glass doors

segments.scene_description: The camera moves out into a heavy downpour in a futuristic commercial plaza. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from surrounding modern glass buildings. The player walks past metal gazebo structures, outdoor seating with umbrellas, and storefronts with glowing red signage, continuing through the rain-soaked environment toward the plaza center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a quiet, voyeuristic observation of an indoor encounter to a walk through a rain-drenched futuristic plaza. It begins with a stationary view through a large glass window, watching a woman join a man at a high table inside a futuristic bar from the shelter of an outdoor wooden deck. As the camera turns away from the window, the scene opens into a heavy downpour within a commercial plaza where wet pavement reflects the vivid neon lights of surrounding glass buildings. The movement continues past metal gazebo structures and outdoor seating with umbrellas, shifting through the rain-soaked environment toward the plaza center. The journey concludes by passing storefronts with glowing red signage as the camera pushes deeper into the neon-lit urban landscape.
